text: I am intrigued by the sterile, modern setting and the way glass walls separate space and knowledge. Entering the R+D exhibit, I sense the human urge to innovate and reflect—a vibrant celebration of the mind’s connection with technology. The bright, geometric visuals evoke possibility, while the tidy displays suggest order in the midst of creative chaos. The philosophical tension between what machines mean for our species stirs within me. I feel simultaneously curious and cautious, compelled to question how much of myself I find in these artifacts and displays.
